results.label: ministr
results.result_text: Output matches `[0, 1, 1, 2, 4, 7, 13, 24]`. The bug was a missing `prev[-2]` term in `_trib` — the recurrence was computing `T(n-3) + T(n-1)` instead of `T(n-3) + T(n-2) + T(n-1)`.
results.error: VALIDITY: arm A made zero mcp__ministr__ calls (treatment not received)

results.label: grep
results.result_text: The fix is a one-character change on line 370: `prev[-3] + prev[-1]` was missing `prev[-2]`, so T(n-2) was never added to the recurrence. Adding it back gives the correct sequence `[0, 1, 1, 2, 4, 7,
